home.heroTitle: Dubai real estate — for owners, end users, and investors.
home.heroSub: A clear process, accurate numbers, weekly reporting. Whitewill · True Broker (Bayut) · SuperAgent (Property Finder) · King's College London graduate · Master's in International Business Management · Background in corporate finance. Working in English and Russian.
home.pathSub: Three workstreams — each with its own focus and timeline. Pick the closest fit and I'll walk you through what happens next.
home.pathOwnersSub: Close in 30–45 days at market price.
home.pathBuyersSub: Curated to your goals and budget, with off-market access.
home.pathTenantsSub: Yield-focused properties with full ROI maths and a planned exit.
home.listingsSub: A few properties from the active book. Full inventory on my Property Finder and Bayut profiles.
home.offmarketTitle: Deals that never reach public search
home.offmarketBody: Alongside the public book I work on transactions that don't get listed: distressed positions, accelerated sales, private offerings from owners and through the broker network. If you need that kind of entry into the market — or, on the other side, a discreet exit — get in touch and I'll share what's currently on the table.
home.insightsTeaserSub: Short, sharp pieces on the Dubai market — no fluff.
home.metaTitle: Daniil Shalabaev · Real estate broker in Dubai · Whitewill
home.metaDescription: Buy, sell, and invest in Dubai real estate. True Broker (Bayut) and SuperAgent (Property Finder) certified. King's College London. Bilingual EN/RU.

stats.valuationLabel: Valuation built on real DLD transactions

owners.painsSub: The recurring reasons a property sits unsold or trades below market.

pains.title: Walk-ins instead of qualified buyers
pains.fix: Every buyer is qualified before the viewing.

pains.title: Weak visual presentation
pains.fix: Professional photography, drone, and developer-grade post-production.

pains.title: No regular feedback loop
pains.fix: Weekly report: viewings, feedback, listing analytics.

owners.processSub: Five steps that separate "sitting on the portal" from "sold."

process.title: Professional photography
process.body: Photographer, drone, twilight session. The property is presented the way the target buyer expects to see it.

process.title: Post-production
process.body: Perspective and lighting correction, light virtual staging where the interior is empty.

process.title: Marketing plan
process.body: Bayut TruBroker, Property Finder SuperAgent, social channels, private database, broker network distribution.

process.title: Weekly reporting
process.body: Listing views, inbound calls, viewings conducted, detailed buyer feedback — every week.

process.title: Buyer qualification
process.body: Only buyers matching the budget, intent, and timeline reach the viewing.

owners.caseBody: A series of closed transactions in Dubai Hills (HAB) over recent cycles. Specific addresses and figures available on request under NDA.
owners.caseDisclaimer: Specific figures and addresses available on request under NDA.
owners.ctaBlockTitle: A valuation of your property in 24 hours
owners.ctaBlockSub: Built on real DLD transactions and current market analytics. No inflated expectations and no promises I can't keep.

values.title: Off-market access

values.title: All key districts
values.body: Downtown, Marina, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai Hills, Creek Harbour, Business Bay, JVC — and beyond.

values.title: Two-language process
values.body: Negotiations, paperwork, banking, DLD — handled in your language, with no nuance lost in translation.

values.title: Finance background
values.body: King's College London plus finance experience. ROI, cash-on-cash, payment plans, and mortgage scenarios — modelled, not guessed.

buyers.districtsSub: Selected average prices by district, Q1 2026.

process.title: Brief
process.body: Goal, budget, holding horizon, risk profile. Thirty minutes is enough to know what to look for.

process.title: Shortlist
process.body: Properties curated against your brief. Viewings only happen on what genuinely fits.

process.title: End-to-end transaction
process.body: Reservation, NOC, DLD, bank, residency. I run every step.

buyers.ctaBlockTitle: Tell me what you're looking for
buyers.ctaBlockSub: I'll prepare a shortlist with ROI analysis within 48 hours.

about.metaTitle: About · Daniil Shalabaev · Real estate broker in Dubai
about.metaDescription: Daniil Shalabaev. King's College London graduate, Master's in International Business Management from Lomonosov Moscow State University (MSU). Corporate finance at Alfa-Bank in Moscow, then Sales Manager at Sobha in Dubai. Today — broker with Whitewill. Bilingual EN/RU. Finance background and a real grasp of deal economics.
about.title: Daniil Shalabaev
about.subtitle: King's College London and MSU graduate
about.quote: A deal is always about the person. The numbers serve the goal, not the other way around.
about.intro: I'm Daniil — a real estate broker in Dubai with Whitewill. Before real estate: corporate finance at Alfa-Bank in Moscow. King's College London graduate; Master's in International Business Management from Lomonosov Moscow State University (MSU). Before Whitewill: Sales Manager at Sobha, one of Dubai's leading developers.

timeline.body: Career start: financial analysis and transaction support in mid-market corporate banking.
Graduate, followed by a Master's in International Business Management at Lomonosov Moscow State University (MSU). International environment, analytical foundation.
The developer market from the inside: project sourcing, budgeting, buyer logic — among ~600 sales managers, a sharp competitive school.
Today: True Broker, SuperAgent, personal and company stock, average cycle 30–45 days.

about.developersIntro: Whitewill is a top-tier sales partner for the developers shaping Dubai and Abu Dhabi today. That means earlier access to launches, broker-only inventory and direct lines to project teams — not portal scraps.

developers.name: Emaar
developers.body: Dubai's largest publicly listed developer. Behind Burj Khalifa, Downtown, Dubai Marina, Dubai Hills, Emaar Beachfront. Benchmark for liquidity on resale.

developers.name: Aldar
developers.body: Abu Dhabi's largest listed developer, founded 2004. Yas Island, Saadiyat, Al Reem — gateway for end users shifting capital from Dubai into the capital.

developers.name: DAMAC
developers.body: Major luxury and high-rise developer. Branded residences with Cavalli, de Grisogono, Versace; DAMAC Hills, DAMAC Lagoons.

developers.name: Meraas
developers.body: Government-backed lifestyle developer. City Walk, Bluewaters, La Mer, Port de La Mer — destination-led communities.

developers.name: Sobha
developers.body: Premium build-quality developer with vertically integrated construction. Sobha Hartland, MBR City — favoured by end-users who care about finish.

developers.name: Nakheel
developers.body: Master-developer behind Palm Jumeirah, Palm Jebel Ali, Dubai Islands. Defines waterfront supply at the top of the market.

developers.name: Select Group
developers.body: Boutique luxury developer focused on Dubai Marina and waterfront. Six Senses Residences, Peninsula, Jumeirah Living Marina Gate.

developers.name: Binghatti
developers.body: Fast-moving design-led developer. Branded collaborations with Mercedes-Benz, Bugatti, Jacob & Co; strong yields in Business Bay and JVC.

developers.name: Modon
developers.body: Abu Dhabi master-developer behind Hudayriyat Island and select Reem schemes. Government-backed, long-horizon master plans.

about.philosophyBody: A finance background is a habit of running the numbers. Cash-on-cash, ROI, exit scenarios — we speak the same language. I don't sell emotion. I offer maths and a clear choice.
